sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date String, value Int32);
SELECT event_date, parseDateTime64BestEffortOrZero(event_date, 3) as parsed_date, value FROM test_dates WHERE (parsed_date ? value : 0) > 0;
SELECT event_date, value, (CASE WHEN parseDateTime64BestEffortOrZero(event_date, 3) = 0 THEN 'Invalid Date' ELSE event_date END) as date_status FROM test_dates;
SELECT *, (parseDateTime64BestEffortOrZero(event_date, 3) ? value : 0) as computed_value FROM test_dates HAVING computed_value > 100;
CREATE TABLE parent_table (parent_id Int32, parent_name String);
CREATE TABLE child_table (child_id Int32, parent_id Int32, child_name String);
SELECT p.parent_name, (SELECT count(*) FROM child_table c WHERE c.parent_id = p.parent_id ? 1 : 0) as child_count FROM parent_table p;

SELECT c.child_name, (parseDateTime64BestEffortOrZero((SELECT p.parent_name FROM parent_table p WHERE p.parent_id = c.parent_id), 3) ? c.child_id : -1) as result_id FROM child_table c ORDER BY result_id;
